mpBio:
* Former Additional Advocate-General
* Advocate Supreme Court Azad Jammu & Kashmir
* Visiting Faculty Member, Department of Law, UAJK
* Senior Vice President Insaf Lawyers Forum AJ&K
* Legal Advisor SERRA Govt of Pakistan 
* Member Managing board PRCS AJK
* Section Officer, Law, Justine Department

Sind Muslim Govt. Law College  Karachi University, LLB, 2002 – 2005
University of Azad Jammu and Kashmir, LLM, Law, Feb 2007 – Dec 2009
